sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92493" key="r(inokolou/sths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥῑνο-κολούστης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n92493.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">nose-clipper</tr_>, of Heracles, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:9:25:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.25.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
